title: Sloe Berry Skewers with Chinese BBQ Sauce
description: A sweet and savory Chinese-inspired appetizer featuring tender berry and sloe chunks. These bite-sized skewers are perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Thread a piece of berry and a piece of sloe onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together honey and soy sauce.
Brush the mixture evenly over the skewers.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until the berries start to caramelize.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
